channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bus stop flag in Lennard Rd Penge, 10m SE of the Newlands Park junction, south / westbound - no 75 timetable to Croydon on display., 16th April
item.description:
Bus stop flag in Lennard Rd Penge, 10m SE of the Newlands Park junction, south / westbound - no 75 timetable to Croydon on display. This is either missing or slipped down behind the other timetable.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lennard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 66, Lennard Rd, Penge - Holy Trinity Church - Wheely bin being left on public footway instead of within the church curtilage., 16th April
item.description:
66, Lennard Rd, Penge - Holy Trinity Church - Wheely bin being left on public footway instead of within the church curtilage. Seen 15th and 16th April 2026.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Lennard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Construction waste dumped on road, 16th April
item.description:
Construction waste dumped on road, present for 1 week+.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Culverstone Close, Hayes, Greater London

item.title: Sunken manhole cover, 16th April
item.description:
Sunken double sized manhole cover in the carriageway which makes a banging sound when driven over. Located on Southwark Bridge, what3words location ///slip.shack.acute

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen Street Place, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Palettes & rubbish in Oswin St, Brook Dv end, 16th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oswin Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London

item.title: Between 51 chichester road and st mungos, 16th April
item.description:
Multiple bin bags with bags ripped open including pampers - health risk

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Illuminated sign STILL out, 16th April
item.description:
Ref 8432389 Sign light about two way traffic sign is still out. You closed the old report and I can’t reopen it so this is a re log Sign P1762 Light above two way traffic sign
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): South Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned accident damaged car, 16th April
item.description:
Car has been left on double yellow line and partly on pavement at junction of Shepperton Road & Crescent Drive for well over a week. Needs to be removed as Shepperton Road is being resurfaced next week.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shepperton Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish Dumped at Electrical Sub-Station, 16th April
item.description:
An amount of rubbish has been left dumped in front of the Electrical Sub-Station. Can the local team please clean it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Furniture Dumped on Pavement, 16th April
item.description:
A item of broken furniture has been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish Dumped on Pavement, 16th April
item.description:
Multiple items of rubbish have been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
